HIGO HOUSES 
Mallorca🇪🇸 & Tuscany🇮🇹

Each venue, Finca Higo in Mallorca or Castello Higo in Tuscany, has its own unique feeling and spirit. Both combine a place for practice, nature, and simply a place to reconnect with all your senses.

From practice right at the beach in Mallorca to stunning views over the Tuscan countryside, we'd be happy if you'd call Higo Houses your home.

Arrive one way. 
Leave another.

📸
@karin.purker 

#retreat #retreatlife #mallorca #tuscany #pilates

📍 Castello Higo - Tuscany, Italy 🇮🇹

Our Castello is nestled in the heart of Tuscany, just a 15-minute drive from Siena.

Each room tells a story of centuries past. Original 17th-century frescoes, antique furniture, and Italian works of art blend seamlessly with the peaceful countryside surrounding Siena.

Once a Tuscan wedding venue, this stunning Castello is now slowly being transformed into a place to reconnect, feel grounded, and immerse yourself in the art and history carried within its walls.

Our retreat centre can host up to 20 guests across 11 rooms and 9 bathrooms, with nearly every room offering access to an ensuite bathroom. On the ground floor, you’ll find our antique fresco-covered studio. With its curved walls and wooden floors, it creates a warm and grounding atmosphere for yoga, movement, and retreat sessions.

Castello Higo is a place to pause in awe, to experience the art, culture, and history that define it. From the historic interiors to the French garden and the pool overlooking Siena, every corner invites you to slow down and take it all in.

#italy #retreat #tuscany #pilatesretreat

The colours that paint our life 🌿💭
•
#yoga #retreat #nature #mallorca #love #islandlife #island #yogaretreat #mindfulness #beach #yogaretreat #yogaretreatspain #yogaretreatlocation #dream

🇮🇹✨ Tuscany Yoga Retreat | 20–25 September 2027 ✨🇮🇹

I am so excited to finally share a project that I have been quietly working on behind the scenes...

In September 2027, I am planning a very special 'Italian Cultural Yoga Retreat in Tuscany'.

Nestled amongst rolling vineyards, ancient olive groves, and the breathtaking Tuscan countryside near Siena, our retreat home will be a beautiful historic villa full of charm, character, and authentic Italian spirit.

Imagine waking up to panoramic views across the Tuscan landscape, beginning your day with yoga, enjoying delicious local cuisine, exploring centuries of history and culture, sharing long outdoor meals beneath the Italian sky, and embracing the slower pace of life that makes this region so magical.

This retreat will be about so much more than yoga.

✨ Daily yoga practices
✨ Beautiful Tuscan food
✨ A traditional Italian cooking experience
✨ Time to rest, recharge, and reconnect
✨ Exploring local culture and history
✨ Meaningful connection and community
✨ Space to slow down and savour life

My vision is to create a warm, welcoming, and supportive experience where we can practise together, explore together, share wonderful food, make lasting memories, and immerse ourselves in the beauty of Tuscany.

📍 Tuscany, Italy
📅 20–25 September 2027
🏡 Historic villa near Siena

If this sounds like something you would love to be part of, or if you would like more information, please email: info@namasyoga.co.uk or send me a DM.

I would love to hear from you and share more details as plans unfold.

Places will be limited to maintain an intimate and community-centred experience.

I truly cannot wait to share this experience with you.

With love,

Mas x ❤️

#TuscanyYogaRetreat2027 #Italy2027 #RetreatLife #YogaTravel #ItalianEscape
No trending audio needed for this one 🐚🏝️

📍 Castello Higo - Tuscany, Italia
Art, elegance, and history, our little castle in the heart of Tuscany is the perfect spot for retreats that want to lean back and enjoy the beauty of Italy😋😍

Open spots for fall 2026.

#yogaretreat #yoga #tuscanyretreat #castellohigo #artstudio

Wild Woman was everything and more 🍋

This magical finca @higo_houses in a cove surrounded by mountains and water held us in safety and made us go very deep within.

I am so grateful for the beautiful retreat I got to co-create with all the beautiful women who participated. 

And a special thanks goes to @anotherhealingrealm for taking care of all the important details and to @darceysupelli for capturing on videos and photos (still to come!)

I still have to process before I’ll be able to share more words about it. But for now ❤️ is full.

#mallorcaretreat #womensretreat #wombwisdom #talesofherretreats

📍Finca Higo🇪🇸
After many hours and multiple IKEA visits, we are happy to open our new studio for the upcoming session.

The new studio offers a space for creativity and shelter in bad weather.

The next improvement will be a new outdoor wooden deck overlooking the sea and mountains. More information will follow ☺️🙏

Castello Higo - Tuscany, Italy🫒🇮🇹

Located in the heart of Tuscany, just 15 minutes from Siena, is our new portfolio villa, Castello Higo. 

Elegant, historic, and aesthetic, our new retreat center, with its frescoes, culture, and rich history, can welcome up to 20 people in 11 rooms. Hidden among olive groves and overlooking Siena.

We will be welcoming our first groups this summer, and spots for September and October are now open too. Looking forward to sharing further updates. 

Finally, this region of Italy is just such a beauty!
#retreat #tuscany #tuscanyretreat #siena #yogalife

Your Villa, Your Castle, Your Castello!✨
We are excited to introduce Castello Higo – Tuscany, Italy🫒🇮🇹

After months of searching for our second property to create more variety and availability, we are thrilled to introduce our newest addition in the heart of Tuscany, Italy. Just a 15-minute drive from Siena, this villa, with its history, elegance, frescoes, and sheer beauty, has captured our hearts.

Featuring 11 rooms and a stunning studio in the heart of the villa😍

We’re already excited for the first groups.
Exciting times!✨✨🙏

#italy #pilates
#retreat #tuscany

Let Nature Lead & Stillness Speak😌
.
.
Finca Higo is blessed with untouched nature and the calmness that comes with it. Protected by the stunning Tramuntana mountains and located right next to the sea, it's the perfect place to reflect and appreciate the art of nature. 🫒🌊

Retreat by the sea 🌊
Ending with savasana and simply listening to the sounds of nature and the waves is a truly special experience ✨🙏

#mallorca #retreat #sea #savasana #nature

𝐃𝐮 𝐟𝐮𝐧𝐤𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐫𝐬𝐭. 𝐃𝐮 𝐭𝐫𝐚̈𝐠𝐬𝐭 𝐕𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐮𝐧𝐠. 𝐃𝐮 𝐡𝐚̈𝐥𝐭𝐬𝐭 𝐳𝐮𝐬𝐚𝐦𝐦𝐞𝐧.

Irgendwann merkst Du: So wie bisher fühlt es sich nicht mehr stimmig an. Nicht dramatisch, nicht laut, sondern leise und klar.

Dieses Retreat auf Mallorca ist kein Wellnessurlaub und kein „Ich gönn mir mal was“. 

Es ist ein Raum, der Dich zurückholt zu Deiner inneren Ausrichtung, zu Deiner Kraft und Deiner Freude.

In der absoluten Ruhe des UNESCO-Welterbes der Serra de Tramuntana reguliert sich Dein Nervensystem. Dein Körper kommt hinterher. Dein Herz öffnet sich wieder.

Wir klären, was Dich blockiert. 
Nicht theoretisch, sondern spürbar.

Du gehst nicht mit Hochgefühl nach Hause. 
Du gehst stabil. Klar. Aufgerichtet.

Der Rahmen:

📍 Mallorca | UNESCO-Welterbe
🗓️ 10.–15. Mai 2026
🕊️ Maximal 12 Menschen. Privat. Geschützt.
✨ 10 % Early Bird bis 31. März 2026

Kein Massen-Event. Kein Seminarhotel.  Kein Showprogramm.

Ein Raum, in dem Du Dich selbst wieder hörst.

➡️ 𝐀𝐥𝐥𝐞 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐨𝐬 𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐝𝐞𝐬𝐭 𝐃𝐮 𝐨𝐛𝐞𝐧 𝐢𝐧 𝐦𝐞𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐦 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐟𝐢𝐥 🤍

➡️ 𝐡𝐭𝐭𝐩𝐬://𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐳𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐭-𝐚𝐤𝐚𝐝𝐞𝐦𝐢𝐞.𝐜𝐨𝐦/𝐫𝐞𝐭𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭-𝐬𝐩𝐚𝐧𝐢𝐞𝐧-𝐦𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐫𝐜𝐚/

Die ersten Gespräche starten bereits jetzt persönlich.

Wenn Du jetzt schon spürst, dass dieses Retreat für Dich relevant ist,
schreib mir direkt eine Nachricht.

Max. 12 Plätze.
Keine Impulsbuchung.
Sondern eine klare Entscheidung für Dich.

Wenn Du innerlich nickst, beginnt genau hier Dein nächster Schritt.

𝐈𝐜𝐡 𝐛𝐢𝐧 𝐧𝐢𝐜𝐡𝐭 𝐡𝐢𝐞𝐫, 𝐮𝐦 𝐝𝐚𝐳𝐮𝐳𝐮𝐠𝐞𝐡𝐨̈𝐫𝐞𝐧.
𝐈𝐜𝐡 𝐛𝐢𝐧 𝐡𝐢𝐞𝐫, 𝐮𝐦 𝐰𝐢𝐫𝐤𝐬𝐚𝐦 𝐳𝐮 𝐬𝐞𝐢𝐧.

Finca Higo is located in the northwest of Mallorca & is set within 38 hectares of private land in the Tramuntana Mountains. Authentic Mallorcan-style rooms, an indoor yoga shala and nature all around.

Hast du Lust auf Yoga Retreat, dass dir mehr gibt als nur Entspannung & eine traumhafte Location?
Ein Retreat, das dich nachhaltig verändert?

Ein Retreat, und hiermit zitiere ich eine unserer lieben Teilnehmerinnen, das dein Fass nicht nur auffüllt. Sondern umkippt, ausleert, gründlich reinigt und ganz frisch auffüllt?✨🙌🏽🧼

Wunderbar! 
Denn @andilebt und ich tun es wieder🙊💜💫
 
☞︎ wir organisieren unser ✨Be the Light Yoga Retreat✨
 
Hier vereinen wir beide was wir über Jahre auf unseren Reisen, Ausbildungen & in spirituellen Communities gelernt haben: 

Kraftvolle Meditationen, emotionale Release & Regulierungs - Techniken, transformative Mindset Hacks & vieles mehr, die dich dein Leben mal von einer ganz neuen Perspektive sehen & verstehen lassen❤️
 
Komm im Herbst 2026 für eine Woche mit uns in den ruhigen Nordwesten Mallorcas und finde inmitten der Stille der Natur wieder ganz zu dir selbst.

Wir freuen uns euch im @finca_higo einen kraftvollen und wunderschönen Ort für diese zauberhafte Transformation bereitstellen zu dürfen.

Hier die Facts:
☞︎ Vom 20. - 27. September 2026 in Mallorca

* 7 Nächte in einer wunderschönen Villa zwischen Bergen und Meer
* liebevoll zubereitete pflanzliche Mahlzeiten, drei Mal täglich
* tägliches Yoga & Meditationen
* Yoga Nidra
* Embodied Transformational Breathwork Session
* Empowering Soul Photography Session mit @andilebt.photography 
* Kakao Zeremonie & Ecstatic Dance
* Zeremonien & Rituale
* Emotional Healing Workshops
* Mindset Alchemy
* Journaling Praxis
* Kirtan & Sharing Circles
* H’oponopono 
* Zeit am privaten Pool oder am Strand (nur 5 Gehminuten!!) für dich selbst

Gerne beantworten wir dir alle Fragen dazu. Schreib uns an! 🤗  Mehr Infos und die Anmeldung findest du in der Bio oder unter 

www.theblissfulpath.at/retreats 

Wir freuen uns auf dich,
Andi💕Steffi

Our yoga shala is fully equipped with @lotuscrafts props and offers plenty of room for your practice. Large windows can be opened to let in fresh air and the sounds of nature, creating a calming atmosphere. A sound system is also available to enhance your sessions.
•
Nuestro shala de yoga está completamente equipado con accesorios de @lotuscrafts y ofrece mucho espacio para tu práctica. Las amplias ventanas se pueden abrir para dejar entrar el aire fresco y los sonidos de la naturaleza, creando un ambiente relajante. También hay un sistema de sonido disponible para enriquecer tus sesiones.

Lose yourself in the peaceful rhythm of our garden view. Lush palms swaying, lemon and avocado trees all around, the soft rustle of olive branches in the breeze. From here, you can hear nothing but nature: the wind, the birds, the distant whisper of the sea. A little slice of serenity, just waiting for you.
•
Piérdete en el ritmo tranquilo de nuestro jardín. Palmeras que se mecen, limoneros y aguacateros por todas partes, el suave susurro de las ramas de olivo en la brisa. Desde aquí, no se escucha nada más que la naturaleza: el viento, los pájaros, el murmullo lejano del mar. Un pedacito de serenidad que te está esperando.

✨ GEWINNSPIEL – Gewinne deinen kostenlosen Retreat-Platz! ✨

Ihr Lieben, es ist Zeit, etwas zurückzugeben. Wir möchten euch von Herzen einen wundervollen Platz bei unserem SELFCARE WOMEN YOGA RETREAT auf Mallorca schenken.

Die größte Freude ist es, anderen etwas Gutes zu tun. Deshalb geben wir dir die Möglichkeit, bei unserem Selfcare Women Yoga Retreat dabei zu sein – um deine Seele baumeln zu lassen, dir die Auszeit zu gönnen, die du brauchst, und einfach mal komplett abzuschalten.

⸻

💫 So nimmst du am Gewinnspiel teil:

	1.	Like diesen Beitrag.
	2.	Folge @bodymindsoul_yoga & @katharina_schueler auf Instagram.
	3.	Verlinke deine Lieblingsperson in den Kommentaren, mit der du nach Mallorca fliegen möchtest, und schreibe dazu, warum du unbedingt dabei sein möchtest.
	4.	Erhöhe deine Gewinnchance, indem du diesen Beitrag in deiner Story teilst.

Wir drücken dir fest die Daumen, dass du diesen besonderen Platz gewinnst! 🍀

⸻

ℹ️ Good to know:

• Für dich und deine Herzensperson ist bereits ein Doppelzimmer in unserer traumhaften Finca reserviert.

• Wichtig: ❗️Der Gewinn kann nur eingelöst werden, wenn du gemeinsam mit deiner Begleitperson teilnimmst. Deine Freundin/dein Lieblingsmensch zahlt den regulären Retreat-Beitrag (minus 10 % Rabatt).

• Du erhältst deinen Retreatplatz (inklusive Unterkunft und Verpflegung) komplett kostenfrei.

👉 Teilnahmeschluss: Sonntag, 21. September, 21:00 Uhr

💙P.S.: Falls du dieses Retreat schon gebucht hast, kannst du trotzdem teilnehmen und deinen Platz gewinnen.

#gewinnspiel #mallorcaretreat #selfcare #zeitfürdich #frauenretreat #meer #auszeit

Bildmaterial: @danielwaschnig & @finca_higo

We can’t wait to welcome the Selfcare Women Yoga Retreat to Finca Higo from October 13–18, 2025. Led by Katharina & Lisa, this intimate gathering is a celebration of femininity, rest and reconnection, set in the heart of Mallorca’s Tramuntana mountains, just steps away from the sea. Te espera una semana de conexión profunda, yoga nutritivo y empoderamiento femenino. Más información en yogaamseerosensteg.at/selfcareretreat

Just 10 minutes from Finca Higo, Sa Calobra awaits with its crystal-clear waters and dramatic coastal views. Swim, snorkel, hike or simply relax by the sea. The famous winding road curve makes the journey an adventure in itself. Along the way, you might even meet some fluffy local friends.
•
A solo 10 minutos de Finca Higo, Sa Calobra te espera con sus aguas cristalinas y vistas costeras espectaculares. Puedes nadar, hacer snorkel, senderismo o simplemente relajarte junto al mar. La famosa carretera serpenteante convierte el trayecto en toda una aventura. Y por el camino, incluso podrías encontrarte con algunos simpáticos amigos lanudos.

From the 12th to the 14th of September, @anchoringthelight will host a transformative journey at our retreat space, WILKA TAITA SELF SOURCE WEEKENDER. These three days of Ceremony will take place on the beautiful island of Mallorca. You will sit in Ceremony at the stunning 18th-century Finca Higo, surrounded by the Tramuntana mountains and with private access to the beach. This retreat offers the opportunity to connect deeply with nature and with yourself, nurturing your somatic intelligence. 
More information can be found at anchoringthelight.com.

P.S.: Only a few more spots left, so be quick!
•
Del 12 al 14 de septiembre, @anchoringthelight te invita a vivir un viaje transformador en nuestro espacio de retiro, WILKA TAITA SELF SOURCE WEEKENDER.
Durante estos tres días de Ceremonia, nos reuniremos en la hermosa isla de Mallorca. Compartirás la Ceremonia en la impresionante Finca Higo, del siglo XVIII, rodeada por las montañas de la Tramuntana y con acceso privado a la playa. Este retiro ofrece la oportunidad de conectar profundamente con la naturaleza y contigo mismo, nutriendo tu inteligencia somática.
Puedes encontrar más información en anchoringthelight.com.

P.D.: ¡Quedan muy pocas plazas, así que date prisa!

I am very happy to announce the beginning of my collaboration with @finca_higo ,  an hidden gem nestled between Mallorca’s mountains and the sea, where Anton and Jakob created a space where yoga, nature and community come together in harmony to offer your group a seamless and soulful retreat experience. On my side, I’ll do my best to support the project with healthy food tailor made with love on the necessities of the groups! Very looking forward!
.

At Finca Higo, food is a celebration of balance, beauty and intention. Our plant-based, seasonal dishes are thoughtfully prepared to nourish, using fresh ingredients, many of which come straight from our own garden. With our private chef @chefmichelasaragoni, we’re happy to co-create a menu that suits the unique needs and preferences of your wonderful community.
•
En Finca Higo, la comida es una celebración del equilibrio, la belleza y la intención. Nuestros platos de origen vegetal y de temporada están cuidadosamente preparados para nutrir, utilizando ingredientes frescos, muchos de ellos directamente de nuestro propio huerto. Con nuestra chef privada @chefmichelasaragoni, estaremos encantados de crear juntos un menú que se adapte a las necesidades y preferencias únicas de tu hermosa comunidad.

•

Summer in our garden is a celebration of abundance with sun-kissed flavors, fragrant air and moments of stillness that nourish the soul. Here, surrounded by nature’s gifts, we slow down and savor the simple, homegrown joys.
•
El verano en nuestro jardín es una celebración de la abundancia: sabores bañados por el sol, aire perfumado y momentos de calma que nutren el alma. Aquí, rodeados de los regalos de la naturaleza, bajamos el ritmo y disfrutamos de las sencillas alegrías cultivadas en casa.

Wander through our gardens and meet our woolly companions roaming freely during the day. They’re part of the rhythm of island life - gentle, grounded and slow. Moments like these reveal a deeper layer of Mallorca’s soul and are all part of the Finca Higo experience.
•
Pasea por nuestros jardines y conoce a nuestros lanudos compañeros que deambulan libremente durante el día. Forman parte del ritmo de vida en la isla: tranquilo, arraigado y sin prisas. Momentos así te conectan con una dimensión más profunda del alma mallorquina, y son parte esencial de la experiencia en Finca Higo.

Meet Michela, our private chef at Finca Higo. With a passion for creating unique culinary experiences, she brings creativity, care and a deep respect for ingredients to every dish. After sailing over 80,000 sea miles as a yacht chef, she now brings her refined, flexible style to the natural charm of our retreat kitchen.
•
Conoce a Michela, nuestra chef privada en Finca Higo. Con una pasión por crear experiencias culinarias únicas, aporta creatividad, dedicación y un profundo respeto por los ingredientes en cada plato. Tras haber navegado más de 80,000 millas náuticas como chef en yates, ahora trae su estilo refinado y flexible a la cocina con encanto natural de nuestro retiro.

@finca_higo is the perfect place for your next transformative yoga retreat, surrounded by the UNESCO-listed Tramuntana Mountains and the serene Cala Tuent. 🌊

Practice in nature, flow through lush gardens or relax by the beach. 🧘‍♀️

Limited spots available for the first two weeks of September this year — don’t miss out! 😍

Interested? Feel free to contact us and check the link in our bio for more details. 😊

Yoga, nature & sea — your retreat starts here 🧘‍♀️☀️

#FincaHigo #YogaRetreat #MallorcaMagic #nature #SoulfulEscape #yoga #mindfulness #calm

Just 5 minutes to paradise 🌊🌴
A short walk through the lush garden leads you to the beach — a peaceful, hidden bay with crystal-clear turquoise water 💙
Perfect for yoga, swimming, snorkeling or simply soaking in the silence. 🧘‍♀️🌞
Looking for adventure? Hop on a boat tour and explore Mallorca’s stunning coastline from the sea. 🚤

#fincahigo #yogabeachvibes #crystalclearwaters #mallorcacoast #retreatdestination #natureescape #yoga #retreat

Space to breathe, space to be 🌿🌅
Finca-Higo sits on 38 hectares of private land — with lush gardens, mountain views, and sunsets that light the cliffs in glowing red tones 🏞✨
Dine under the stars, swim in the pool, or simply wander the peaceful grounds. Here, nature is not just around you — it holds you. 🍊

#fincahigo #retreatspace #sunsetview #mallorcaretreat #natureheals #yogainthemountains #sacredspaces #garden #yoga #retreat #yogaretreat #mountains #mallorca

Your peaceful retreat at Finca-Higo 🛏
Whether you choose a cozy single or a spacious double room — every space offers comfort, calm, and breathtaking mountain views 🧘‍♀️✨
Wake up to silence, birdsong, and the magic of Mallorca 🌞

#fincahigo #retreatrooms #yogaretreat #mallorcavibes #mountainviews #mindfultravel #serenespaces
